languages.text: [Ударить по заграждению] "Ты труслив и жалок, Саргона. Но твои уловки не остановят меня на пути к моему рекафу!"
[Strike the barrier] "You are a pathetic coward, Sargona. But your ploys won't stop me getting to my recaf!"
languages.original_text: [Ударить по заграждению] "Ты труслив и жалок, Саргона. Но твои уловки не остановят меня на пути к моему рекафу!"

traits.locale_text: [Strike the barrier] "You are a pathetic coward, Sargona. But your ploys won't stop me getting to my recaf!"
[Attack Sargona] "You are a pathetic coward, Sargona. That is understandable... but where is my blasted recaf?"
[Strike the barrier] "You are a pathetic coward, Sargona. But your ploys won't stop me getting to my recaf!"

[Strike the barrier] "You are a pathetic coward, Sargona. But your ploys won't stop me getting to my recaf!"

languages.text: [Golpear la barrera] «Eres un cobarde patético, Sargona. ¡Pero tus ardides no me impedirán disfrutar de mi café!».
languages.original_text: [Strike the barrier] "You are a pathetic coward, Sargona. But your ploys won't stop me getting to my recaf!"

traits.locale_text: [Golpear la barrera] «Eres un cobarde patético, Sargona. ¡Pero tus ardides no me impedirán disfrutar de mi café!».

languages.text: [攻击屏障]“你真是个没用的孬种，萨戈纳。不过，就算你再怎么耍花招，那杯雷卡咖啡我也喝定了！”
languages.original_text: [Strike the barrier] "You are a pathetic coward, Sargona. But your ploys won't stop me getting to my recaf!"

traits.locale_text: [攻击屏障]“你真是个没用的孬种，萨戈纳。不过，就算你再怎么耍花招，那杯雷卡咖啡我也喝定了！”

languages.text: [Frapper la barrière] « Vous n'êtes qu'un pitoyable lâche, Sargona. Mais ce ne sont pas vos manigances qui me priveront de mon recaff ! »
languages.original_text: [Strike the barrier] "You are a pathetic coward, Sargona. But your ploys won't stop me getting to my recaf!"

traits.locale_text: [Frapper la barrière] « Vous n'êtes qu'un pitoyable lâche, Sargona. Mais ce ne sont pas vos manigances qui me priveront de mon recaff ! »

languages.text: [バリアを攻撃する]「君は哀れな臆病者だな、サルゴナ。だがそんな策略で{mf|俺|私}が模造コーヒーを手に入れるのを止められると思うな！」
languages.original_text: [Strike the barrier] "You are a pathetic coward, Sargona. But your ploys won't stop me getting to my recaf!"

traits.locale_text: [バリアを攻撃する]「君は哀れな臆病者だな、サルゴナ。だがそんな策略で{mf|俺|私}が模造コーヒーを手に入れるのを止められると思うな！」

languages.text: [Bariyere vur] "Acınası bir korkaksın Sargona. Ancak hilelerin benim kahfemden alıkoyamayacak!"
languages.original_text: [Strike the barrier] "You are a pathetic coward, Sargona. But your ploys won't stop me getting to my recaf!"

traits.locale_text: [Bariyere vur] "Acınası bir korkaksın Sargona. Ancak hilelerin benim kahfemden alıkoyamayacak!"

languages.text: [Auf die Barriere schlagen] "Ihr seid ein armseliger Feigling, Sargona. Aber Eure Tricks werden mich nicht von meinem Rekaf abhalten!"
languages.original_text: [Strike the barrier] "You are a pathetic coward, Sargona. But your ploys won't stop me getting to my recaf!"
